ss_final_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Bouncing Ball with Trail</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
            overflow: hidden;
            height: 100vh;
            width: 100vw;
        }
        
        canvas {
            display: block;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
    
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Set canvas size to viewport
        canvas.width = 1920;
        canvas.height = 1080;
        
        // Ball properties
        const ball = {
            x: canvas.width / 2,
            y: 15, // Start at top with radius offset
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            radius: 15,
            color: '#ff6b6b',
            gravity: 0.5, // Scaled gravity (pixels per frame squared)
            dampening: 0.7, // Coefficient of restitution
            friction: 0.999 // Air resistance
        };
        
        // Trail system
        const trail = [];
        const maxTrailLength = 20;
        const trailFadeDuration = 500; // milliseconds
        
        let lastTime = 0;
        let animationStartTime = Date.now();
        
        // Create radial gradient for ball
        function createBallGradient(x, y, radius) {
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                x - radius * 0.3, y - radius * 0.3, 0,
                x, y, radius
            );
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#ff8e8e');
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#ff6b6b');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#e55555');
            return gradient;
        }
        
        // Add trail point
        function addTrailPoint() {
            trail.push({
                x: ball.x,
                y: ball.y,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            });
            
            // Remove old trail points
            if (trail.length > maxTrailLength) {
                trail.shift();
            }
        }
        
        // Draw trail
        function drawTrail() {
            const currentTime = Date.now();
            
            trail.forEach((point, index) => {
                const age = currentTime - point.timestamp;
                const opacity = Math.max(0, 0.5 * (1 - age / trailFadeDuration));
                
                if (opacity > 0) {
                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.globalAlpha = opacity;
                    
                    // Create gradient for trail point
                    const gradient = createBallGradient(point.x, point.y, ball.radius);
                    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                    
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(point.x, point.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    
                    ctx.restore();
                }
            });
            
            // Remove faded trail points
            while (trail.length > 0 && currentTime - trail[0].timestamp > trailFadeDuration) {
                trail.shift();
            }
        }
        
        // Draw ball
        function drawBall() {
            ctx.save();
            
            const gradient = createBallGradient(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius);
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add a subtle highlight
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x - ball.radius * 0.4, ball.y - ball.radius * 0.4, ball.radius * 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            ctx.restore();
        }
        
        // Update ball physics
        function updateBall(deltaTime) {
            // Convert deltaTime to seconds for physics calculations
            const dt = deltaTime / 1000;
            
            // Apply gravity
            ball.vy += ball.gravity * 60 * dt; // Scale for 60fps
            
            // Apply air resistance
            ball.vx *= ball.friction;
            ball.vy *= ball.friction;
            
            // Update position
            ball.x += ball.vx * 60 * dt;
            ball.y += ball.vy * 60 * dt;
            
            // Boundary collisions
            
            // Bottom boundary
            if (ball.y + ball.radius > canvas.height) {
                ball.y = canvas.height - ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.dampening;
                
                // Add some random horizontal velocity for more interesting bounces
                if (Math.abs(ball.vx) < 1) {
                    ball.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
                }
            }
            
            // Top boundary
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.y = ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.dampening;
            }
            
            // Left boundary
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.x = ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.dampening;
            }
            
            // Right boundary
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > canvas.width) {
                ball.x = canvas.width - ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.dampening;
            }
        }
        
        // Animation loop
        function animate(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Update physics
            updateBall(deltaTime);
            
            // Add trail point every few frames for smoother trail
            if (trail.length === 0 || 
                Math.abs(ball.x - trail[trail.length - 1].x) > 2 || 
                Math.abs(ball.y - trail[trail.length - 1].y) > 2) {
                addTrailPoint();
            }
            
            // Draw trail first (behind ball)
            drawTrail();
            
            // Draw ball
            drawBall();
            
            // Continue animation
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        
        // Add some initial horizontal velocity for more interesting movement
        ball.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
    </script>
</body>
</html>
rv_final_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Bouncing Ball with Trail</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        canvas {
            display: block;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
    
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Set canvas size to exactly 1920x1080
        canvas.width = 1920;
        canvas.height = 1080;
        canvas.style.width = '100vw';
        canvas.style.height = '100vh';
        
        // Ball properties
        const ball = {
            x: 960, // Center of 1920px width
            y: 15, // Start at top with radius offset
            vx: 0, // No initial horizontal velocity
            vy: 0, // No initial vertical velocity
            radius: 15,
            gravity: 980, // Realistic gravity (9.8 m/s^2 scaled to pixels)
            restitution: 0.7, // 30% velocity reduction on bounce
            color: '#ff6b6b'
        };
        
        // Trail system
        const trail = [];
        const maxTrailLength = 20;
        const trailFadeDuration = 500; // milliseconds
        
        let lastTime = 0;
        
        // Create radial gradient for ball
        function createBallGradient(x, y, radius) {
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                x - radius * 0.3, y - radius * 0.3, 0,
                x, y, radius
            );
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#ffaaaa');
            gradient.addColorStop(0.3, '#ff6b6b');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#cc3333');
            return gradient;
        }
        
        // Add position to trail
        function addToTrail(x, y, timestamp) {
            trail.push({
                x: x,
                y: y,
                timestamp: timestamp
            });
            
            // Keep only the most recent trail points
            if (trail.length > maxTrailLength) {
                trail.shift();
            }
        }
        
        // Draw trail with proper fading
        function drawTrail(currentTime) {
            for (let i = 0; i < trail.length; i++) {
                const point = trail[i];
                const age = currentTime - point.timestamp;
                
                // Calculate opacity: start at 0.5, fade to 0 over duration
                let opacity = 0.5 * Math.max(0, 1 - (age / trailFadeDuration));
                
                // Additional fade based on position in trail (older = more transparent)
                opacity *= (i / trail.length);
                
                if (opacity > 0.01) {
                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.globalAlpha = opacity;
                    
                    // Use solid color for trail for better visibility
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                    
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(point.x, point.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    
                    ctx.restore();
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Draw main ball
        function drawBall() {
            ctx.save();
            
            const gradient = createBallGradient(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius);
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            ctx.restore();
        }
        
        // Update ball physics
        function updateBall(deltaTime) {
            const dt = deltaTime / 1000; // Convert to seconds
            
            // Apply gravity (downward acceleration)
            ball.vy += ball.gravity * dt;
            
            // Update position based on velocity
            ball.x += ball.vx * dt;
            ball.y += ball.vy * dt;
            
            // Collision detection and response
            
            // Bottom boundary collision
            if (ball.y + ball.radius >= canvas.height) {
                ball.y = canvas.height - ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.restitution; // Reverse and dampen
            }
            
            // Top boundary collision (shouldn't happen in normal gravity fall)
            if (ball.y - ball.radius <= 0) {
                ball.y = ball.radius;
                ball.vy = Math.abs(ball.vy) * ball.restitution;
            }
            
            // Left boundary collision
            if (ball.x - ball.radius <= 0) {
                ball.x = ball.radius;
                ball.vx = Math.abs(ball.vx) * ball.restitution;
            }
            
            // Right boundary collision
            if (ball.x + ball.radius >= canvas.width) {
                ball.x = canvas.width - ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -Math.abs(ball.vx) * ball.restitution;
            }
            
            // Stop micro-bounces when energy is too low
            if (Math.abs(ball.vy) < 20 && ball.y + ball.radius >= canvas.height - 2) {
                ball.vy = 0;
                ball.y = canvas.height - ball.radius;
            }
        }
        
        // Main animation loop
        function animate(currentTime) {
            if (lastTime === 0) lastTime = currentTime;
            const deltaTime = Math.min(currentTime - lastTime, 16.67); // Cap at ~60fps
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            // Update physics
            updateBall(deltaTime);
            
            // Add current position to trail every frame for smooth trail
            addToTrail(ball.x, ball.y, currentTime);
            
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Draw trail first (behind ball)
            drawTrail(currentTime);
            
            // Draw main ball on top
            drawBall();
            
            // Continue animation
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        
        // Reset animation every 8 seconds for continuous demo
        setInterval(() => {
            ball.x = 960; // Center position
            ball.y = 15;  // Top position
            ball.vx = 0;  // No horizontal velocity
            ball.vy = 0;  // No initial vertical velocity
            trail.length = 0; // Clear trail
        }, 8000);
        
        // Handle window resize to maintain proper canvas scaling
        function resizeCanvas() {
            canvas.style.width = '100vw';
            canvas.style.height = '100vh';
        }
        
        window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
        resizeCanvas();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

Founded in 2010, our team has grown to include industry experts from various fields, all united by a common goal of excellence.

We believe in building long-lasting relationships through transparency, reliability, and outstanding results.

Services

Our comprehensive service portfolio includes web development, mobile app creation, and digital marketing strategies.

We specialize in custom software solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client's business objectives.

From initial consultation to final deployment, we provide end-to-end support throughout the entire project lifecycle.

Our agile methodology ensures rapid delivery without compromising on quality or attention to detail.

Portfolio

We take pride in delivering solutions that not only meet requirements but exceed expectations in performance and usability.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Solar System Animation</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        }
        
        canvas {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #111 0%, #000 100%);
            border: 1px solid #333;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="solarSystem" width="1920" height="1080"></canvas>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('solarSystem');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Center of the solar system
        const centerX = canvas.width / 2;
        const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
        
        // Sun properties
        const sun = {
            x: centerX,
            y: centerY,
            radius: 40,
            color: '#FDB813'
        };
        
        // Planet definitions
        const planets = [
            {
                name: 'Mercury',
                radius: 8,
                color: '#B0B0B0',
                orbitRadius: 80,
                period: 3000, // 3 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moon: { radius: 4, color: '#FFFFFF', orbitRadius: 20, angle: 0 }
            },
            {
                name: 'Earth',
                radius: 12,
                color: '#4A90D9',
                orbitRadius: 140,
                period: 5000, // 5 seconds
                angle: Math.PI / 2, // Start at different position
                moon: { radius: 4, color: '#FFFFFF', orbitRadius: 20, angle: 0 }
            },
            {
                name: 'Mars',
                radius: 10,
                color: '#C1440E',
                orbitRadius: 200,
                period: 7000, // 7 seconds
                angle: Math.PI, // Start at different position
                moon: { radius: 4, color: '#FFFFFF', orbitRadius: 20, angle: 0 }
            },
            {
                name: 'Jupiter',
                radius: 18,
                color: '#C88B3A',
                orbitRadius: 280,
                period: 11000, // 11 seconds
                angle: 3 * Math.PI / 2, // Start at different position
                moon: { radius: 4, color: '#FFFFFF', orbitRadius: 20, angle: 0 }
            }
        ];
        
        let startTime = Date.now();
        
        function drawOrbitPath(radius) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, radius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
        }
        
        function drawSun() {
            // Create radial gradient for glow effect
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0)');
            
            // Draw glow
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw sun core
            ctx.fillStyle = sun.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawPlanet(planet, x, y) {
            // Draw shadow (offset from sun direction)
            const shadowOffsetX = (x - centerX) * 0.1;
            const shadowOffsetY = (y - centerY) * 0.1;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x + shadowOffsetX, y + shadowOffsetY, planet.radius * 0.8, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw planet
            ctx.fillStyle = planet.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle highlight
            const highlightGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                x - planet.radius * 0.3, y - planet.radius * 0.3, 0,
                x, y, planet.radius
            );
            highlightGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)');
            highlightGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
            ctx.fillStyle = highlightGradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawMoon(moon, planetX, planetY, moonAngle) {
            const moonX = planetX + Math.cos(moonAngle) * moon.orbitRadius;
            const moonY = planetY + Math.sin(moonAngle) * moon.orbitRadius;
            
            // Draw moon orbit path (very faint)
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.setLineDash([1, 2]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(planetX, planetY, moon.orbitRadius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            
            // Draw moon
            ctx.fillStyle = moon.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moonX, moonY, moon.radius, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle glow to moon
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moonX, moonY, moon.radius + 1, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function animate() {
            const currentTime = Date.now();
            const elapsed = currentTime - startTime;
            
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Draw orbit paths
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                drawOrbitPath(planet.orbitRadius);
            });
            
            // Draw sun
            drawSun();
            
            // Update and draw planets and their moons
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                // Calculate planet position
                const planetAngle = (elapsed / planet.period) * 2 * Math.PI;
                const planetX = centerX + Math.cos(planetAngle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                const planetY = centerY + Math.sin(planetAngle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                
                // Calculate moon position (1 second period = 1000ms)
                const moonAngle = (elapsed / 1000) * 2 * Math.PI;
                
                // Draw planet
                drawPlanet(planet, planetX, planetY);
                
                // Draw moon
                drawMoon(planet.moon, planetX, planetY, moonAngle);
            });
            
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        animate();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Solar System Animation</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        canvas {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #1a1a2e 0%, #000 70%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="solarSystem" width="1920" height="1080"></canvas>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('solarSystem');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Center of the solar system
        const centerX = canvas.width / 2;
        const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
        
        // Sun properties
        const sun = {
            x: centerX,
            y: centerY,
            radius: 40,
            color: '#FDB813'
        };
        
        // Planet definitions
        const planets = [
            {
                name: 'Mercury',
                radius: 8,
                color: '#B0B0B0',
                orbitRadius: 80,
                period: 3000, // 3 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1000, // 1 second
                    angle: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Earth',
                radius: 12,
                color: '#4A90D9',
                orbitRadius: 140,
                period: 5000, // 5 seconds
                angle: Math.PI / 4, // Start at different positions
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1200, // Slightly different for visual interest
                    angle: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Mars',
                radius: 10,
                color: '#C1440E',
                orbitRadius: 200,
                period: 7000, // 7 seconds
                angle: Math.PI / 2,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 800, // Slightly different for visual interest
                    angle: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Jupiter',
                radius: 18,
                color: '#C88B3A',
                orbitRadius: 280,
                period: 11000, // 11 seconds
                angle: Math.PI,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1500, // Slightly different for visual interest
                    angle: 0
                }
            }
        ];
        
        let lastTime = 0;
        
        function drawOrbitPath(radius) {
            ctx.save();
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
            ctx.setLineDash([3, 6]);
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.restore();
        }
        
        function drawSun() {
            // Draw outermost glow (very large radius)
            const outerGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 4);
            outerGlow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0.6)');
            outerGlow.addColorStop(0.2, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0.4)');
            outerGlow.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0.2)');
            outerGlow.addColorStop(0.8, 'rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.1)');
            outerGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 69, 0, 0)');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = outerGlow;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw middle glow
            const middleGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2.5);
            middleGlow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 235, 59, 0.9)');
            middleGlow.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0.8)');
            middleGlow.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.6)');
            middleGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 87, 34, 0.2)');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = middleGlow;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw inner bright core
            const innerGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 1.2);
            innerGradient.addColorStop(0, '#FFEB3B');
            innerGradient.addColorStop(0.6, sun.color);
            innerGradient.addColorStop(1, '#FF9800');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = innerGradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw sun core
            ctx.fillStyle = sun.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawPlanet(planet, x, y) {
            // Calculate direction vector from sun to planet
            const dx = x - centerX;
            const dy = y - centerY;
            const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
            
            // Normalize direction vector
            const normalizedX = dx / distance;
            const normalizedY = dy / distance;
            
            // Create shadow offset (shadow should be on the side away from the sun)
            const shadowDistance = planet.radius * 0.8;
            const shadowX = x + normalizedX * shadowDistance;
            const shadowY = y + normalizedY * shadowDistance;
            
            // Draw planet shadow (dark circle offset from planet)
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(shadowX, shadowY, planet.radius * 0.7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw planet base
            ctx.fillStyle = planet.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add lighting effect (highlight on sun-facing side)
            const lightX = x - normalizedX * planet.radius * 0.3;
            const lightY = y - normalizedY * planet.radius * 0.3;
            
            const highlightGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                lightX, lightY, 0,
                x, y, planet.radius * 1.2
            );
            highlightGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)');
            highlightGradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)');
            highlightGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = highlightGradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawMoon(moon, x, y, planetX, planetY) {
            // Calculate direction from sun to planet (for moon shadow direction)
            const dx = planetX - centerX;
            const dy = planetY - centerY;
            const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
            const normalizedX = dx / distance;
            const normalizedY = dy / distance;
            
            // Moon shadow offset
            const shadowDistance = moon.radius * 0.6;
            const shadowX = x + normalizedX * shadowDistance;
            const shadowY = y + normalizedY * shadowDistance;
            
            // Draw moon shadow
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(shadowX, shadowY, moon.radius * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw moon
            ctx.fillStyle = moon.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, moon.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle highlight to moon
            const moonLightX = x - normalizedX * moon.radius * 0.2;
            const moonLightY = y - normalizedY * moon.radius * 0.2;
            
            const moonHighlight = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                moonLightX, moonLightY, 0,
                x, y, moon.radius
            );
            moonHighlight.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)');
            moonHighlight.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)');
            moonHighlight.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = moonHighlight;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, moon.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function updatePositions(deltaTime) {
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                // Update planet angle (counterclockwise)
                planet.angle -= (deltaTime / planet.period) * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // Update moon angle (counterclockwise, relative to planet)
                planet.moon.angle -= (deltaTime / planet.moon.period) * Math.PI * 2;
            });
        }
        
        function render() {
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Draw orbit paths first (behind everything)
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                drawOrbitPath(planet.orbitRadius);
            });
            
            // Draw sun
            drawSun();
            
            // Draw planets and their moons
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                // Calculate planet position
                const planetX = centerX + Math.cos(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                const planetY = centerY + Math.sin(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                
                // Draw planet
                drawPlanet(planet, planetX, planetY);
                
                // Calculate moon position relative to planet
                const moonX = planetX + Math.cos(planet.moon.angle) * planet.moon.orbitRadius;
                const moonY = planetY + Math.sin(planet.moon.angle) * planet.moon.orbitRadius;
                
                // Draw moon
                drawMoon(planet.moon, moonX, moonY, planetX, planetY);
            });
        }
        
        function animate(currentTime) {
            if (lastTime === 0) {
                lastTime = currentTime;
            }
            
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            updatePositions(deltaTime);
            render();
            
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
